airportRouteDetailsList.generalMessage1: Effective 9 September 2025, all flights to and from Phnom Penh will operate at the new Techo International Airport (KTI), located in Krong Ta Khmau.

Passengers traveling to Cambodia are required to present a round-trip or return ticket at check-in. Non-compliance may result in refusal of acceptance. Please ensure compliance with all entry requirements prior to travel

Passengers traveling to Cambodia are required to present a round-trip or return ticket at check-in. Non-compliance may result in refusal of acceptance. Please ensure compliance with all entry requirements prior to travel.

Foreign passengers must fill the Online e-Arrival Card at least 72 hours prior to arrival in India. The e-Arrival Card can be completed via the official portal:https://indianvisaonline.gov.in/earrival/

airportRouteDetailsList.passengerMessage: Passengers under 14 years of age require approval and consent from a legal representative for booking.
